summary: After CSV/JSONLines exporter verification complete (Reviewer: 95% confidence), proceed to task_5.3 Streamlit enhancement. Current Streamlit app is basic - needs improved UX, filters, visualization, and export integration.
context_updates: SPRINTPLAN.md - task_5.2 COMPLETE, task_5.3 In Progress

task_details.description: Improve UX with filters, search, better graph visualization, and export buttons integrated. Handle real data volumes efficiently.
acceptance_criteria: Improved UX with entity filters (by type, date range, confidence)
Advanced search functionality across all entity types
Better graph visualization with pyvis (interactive, zoom, filters)
PII-safe UI (no sensitive data in logs/display)

existing_features: Detailed entity viewer (limited to 50 per type)
gaps_to_fill: Better error handling and loading states

dependency_notes: Exporters (CSV, JSONL) already implemented - integrate into Streamlit
PII redaction utility available - ensure all displays are safe
lessons_learned: PII redaction must be applied in UI layer too
inner_loop_summary: Analyzed current Streamlit app, reviewed existing exporters for integration, confirmed task priorities with Reviewer. Ready to enhance Streamlit with filters, visualization, and exports.
